anomalies.key: Blood Group ABO & Rh Factor × B2B/Others
anomalies.insight: Blood Group via B2B jumped 388% vs Monday (39 vs 8) and 3.8σ above range. Small base but the severity is notable. Almost certainly a corporate or school health camp requiring blood group screening. Lucknow × Blood Group is also spiking — check if the same B2B client has camps in multiple cities. Confirm with B2B team and ensure sample logistics for blood group tests are in place.

Vitamin & Mineral Screening via App/web up 62% vs Monday (60 vs 37) and 4.8σ above range — the second highest severity anomaly. This package growing strongly on App/web suggests a placement or ranking improvement. Check if it was featured on the App homepage or if a health content piece drove search traffic for vitamin deficiency testing today.

anomalies.key: mumbai × Good Health Gold Package with Smart Report
anomalies.insight: Mumbai Good Health Gold fell 47% vs Monday (41 vs 77) and 2.3σ below range. Monday had unusually high Mumbai Gold demand; today's figure is well below the 7-day mean (~63). Check if a Monday Mumbai-specific Gold promotion ended or if a corporate wellness order that came in Monday did not repeat today.
anomalies.k2: Good Health Gold Package with Smart Report

anomalies.insight: Health Q Advance up 112% vs Monday (36 vs 17) and 4σ above range — entirely via B2B/Others. This is a corporate wellness package; a B2B bulk order was placed today. Confirm with B2B team which client and whether this is a recurring Tuesday order cycle.
Same as above — confirms Health Q Advance is exclusively B2B-driven. B2B team to document the client and assess whether phlebo capacity is available for this recurring order.

Gurgaon B2B up 67% vs Monday (135 vs 81) and 1.4σ above range — contributing 13% of net growth. Gurgaon is also the second largest city gainer today (+77 total). Both B2B and overall city momentum are positive. Check if a new Gurgaon corporate client onboarded this week or if an existing client increased their order volume.

anomalies.key: lucknow × Blood Group ABO & Rh Factor
anomalies.insight: Lucknow Blood Group ABO went from 2 orders Monday to 20 today — 4σ above range. Consistent with the Blood Group × B2B signal — a health camp or school screening drive is running in Lucknow. Ops team to ensure sample collection and processing capacity for blood group tests in Lucknow.

Pune 22:00 slot up 59% vs Monday (65 vs 41) and 2.9σ above range. Late-night Pune demand growing on Tuesdays is a recurring pattern observed across multiple weeks. Check if a Tuesday evening notification is consistently driving this or if it is organic evening demand. If campaign-driven, ensure the pattern is intentional and sustainable.

anomalies.key: delhi × Urine C/S (Urine Culture and Sensitivity)
anomalies.insight: Delhi Urine Culture & Sensitivity fell 37% vs Monday (24 vs 38) and 5σ below range — highest severity decline today. This is a time-sensitive test requiring 48-72 hour incubation; Monday had unusually high Delhi Urine C/S demand. Check if a specific Delhi B2B client or clinic placed a Monday batch that reduced Tuesday's organic demand, or if a slot availability issue is affecting this test today.

Bangalore 23:00 slot up 50% vs Monday (99 vs 66) and 2σ above range. Late-night Bangalore bookings growing on Tuesdays — consistent with the broader pattern of evening demand recovery after Monday's softness. Check if a Tuesday evening push notification is driving this or if it's organic.

Magnesium via App/web up 51% vs Monday (68 vs 45) and 2.8σ above range — a significant recovery after multiple days of Magnesium declining. This may reflect the product team having fixed a listing or ranking issue for Magnesium on App/web. Confirm with the product team whether any change was made, and monitor over the next 2 days to verify the recovery is sustained.

PSA via Telesales up 69% vs Monday (22 vs 13) and 6.8σ above range — the highest severity anomaly today. Very small base but the deviation is extreme. PSA via Telesales spiking suggests a Telesales agent is actively targeting prostate health screening with a specific lead list. Confirm with the Telesales manager whether this is a planned campaign or organic.

anomalies.key: delhi × Good Health Gold Package with Smart Report
anomalies.insight: Delhi Good Health Gold up 43% vs Monday (154 vs 108) and 1.2σ above range — the largest absolute city×SKU growth signal, contributing 11% of net growth. Delhi's strong Gold recovery today offsets Monday's softness. Check if a Delhi-specific Gold promotion launched today or if this reflects organic demand recovery.
anomalies.k2: Good Health Gold Package with Smart Report

anomalies.insight: Mumbai 10:00 slot up 47% vs Monday (116 vs 79) and 1.5σ above range. Morning Mumbai demand recovering strongly on Tuesday after Monday's slower morning. Lucknow 15:00 slot up 126% vs Monday (43 vs 19) and 2.2σ above range. Afternoon Lucknow demand spiking on Tuesday — likely linked to the B2B health camp activity observed in Lucknow today (Blood Group spike). Confirm with ops whether phlebo capacity for afternoon Lucknow collections was adequate.
